emails.subject: Re: Midland Cogeneration Venture
emails.body: Re: Midland Cogeneration Venture Hi.........Thanks for this information, I will update the Global Counterparty system as appropriate. However, please let me know if you have a list of the new phone numbers and what they are supposed to be replacing? Adnan-GCP x58335

emails.subject: Re: Midland Cogeneration Venture
emails.body: Re: Midland Cogeneration Venture Hi.........Thanks for this information, I will update the Global Counterparty system as appropriate. However, please let me know if you have a list of the new phone numbers and what they are supposed to be replacing? Adnan-GCP x58335

emails.subject: Re: Midland Cogeneration Venture
emails.body: Re: Midland Cogeneration Venture The list of new phone numbers will be sent to my usual distribution for documentation, which includes Connie Sutton from Global Contracts. As to what numbers they are replacing, they are replacing all the phone numbers we might have had across the board with this counterparty. If you would like to see the numbers, obtain a copy of the notice from Connie Sutton. As I just mailed it, it should get there in a few days.
